items.key: bp_ref like case when '{[$bp_ref]}' <> '' then '{[$bp_ref]}%' else '''' end and status = '1'

action.text: if exists(select 1 from hrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv) begin select stt_rec from hrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv return end

query.text: select @@fieldExternal from @@prime$partition$current a left join hrnv b on a.stt_rec_nv = b.stt_rec where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec order by @@orderByClause
